actions.description: Render the approved value without transformation.
actions.validation_rule: Allowed only when the role and surface permit the field class.

actions.description: Render a reduced-precision or partially hidden representation.
actions.validation_rule: The result must not preserve a prohibited exact identifier or exact sensitive value.

actions.description: Replace the source value with a non-reversible category label.
actions.validation_rule: No source substring may remain in the rendered value.

actions.description: Exclude the field from the consumer payload or surface.
actions.validation_rule: The field key and value must not be present in the rendered payload.

actions.description: Block the field or surface and return a policy-state explanation.
actions.validation_rule: No restricted source value may be returned with the block response.

actions.description: Reject prohibited material before it enters a consumer payload.
actions.validation_rule: Validation must fail if any role or surface receives the source value.
